title: The Liver King Podcast! With Brian Johnson, aka Liver King

chunks.title: Introduction to Beef Organs and Personal Experience
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses their personal journey with supplementing beef organs and how it transformed their life. They mention the switch to an animal-based diet and gratitude towards Dr. Saladino for this change.
chunks.transcript: life changing check out this review on beef organs from heart and soil supplements from andreas s supplementing with beef organs was one of the best choices i've ever made it allowed me to experience life in a different dimension i can't explain how alive it made me feel and full of life while at the same time the most natural feeling ever it truly enabled me to understand the value and function of organ meat so much so that i have recently switched to an animal-based diet and while i still supplement with the desiccated organs when i don't have access to the fresh ones i am loving life in a different way now thank you dr saladino for reintroducing

chunks.title: The Benefits of Beef Organ Supplements
chunks.summary: The conversation highlights the company's beef organ supplements which include various nutrient-rich organs. The speaker emphasizes that these supplements serve as a natural multivitamin, promoting overall health.
chunks.transcript: me to life truth seekers this is why we do it at hardin soil this is why i'm so proud of this company you can find us at heart and soil dot co our beef organ supplement contains heart liver kidney spleen and pancreas what a multivitamin that is the ultimate multivitamin throw away your synthetic multivitamin and get organs into your life either fresh or desiccated if you want desiccated look no further heart and soil.com grass-fed grass finished regeneratively raised source from new zealand the best on the planet in glass i'm so proud of this company reclaim your birthright to radical health

chunks.title: Introduction of Guest Brian Johnson (Liver King)
chunks.summary: The host introduces Brian Johnson, also known as the Liver King, and shares their personal relationship. They hint at a discussion about Brian’s lifestyle choices, diet, and ancestral practices.
chunks.transcript: my guest on this podcast this week is none other than brian johnson the liver king and yes this is the first podcast he's done i happen to be pretty good friends with him i've known him for a long time and it was awesome to sit down with him and do the show we talked about his history talked about his childhood he talked about his workouts his food whether he counts calories counts macros we talked about peds and steroid use we talked about ancestral ways where it came from we talked about how he and i know each other we talked about heart and soil we talked about his recent trip to africa and peru to meet with many indigenous cultures the messiah the hadza and his trip to the concrete jungle of new york city this was a really fun one i think you're going to enjoy it so without further ado brian johnson as you guys know

chunks.title: Personal Workouts and Daily Diets
chunks.summary: Brian shares insights on his daily workouts and nutrition, highlighting his love for raw foods and organ meats. He discusses how his approach to eating differs from conventional methods.

chunks.title: Resilience to Foodborne Illness
chunks.summary: Brian and the host explore the idea of resilience to foodborne illnesses like salmonella when eating raw foods. They discuss their past experiences and beliefs about human resilience in facing natural bacteria.

chunks.title: Dietary Preferences and Supplements
chunks.summary: The conversation shifts to discuss different meal options for the day and supplementation practices. Brian explains his views on macros, carbs, and the importance of focusing on whole foods over calorie counts.

chunks.title: Heart and Soil: The Birth of a Supplement Company
chunks.summary: Brian and the host discuss the founding of their respective supplement companies, Heart and Soil and Ancestral Supplements, emphasizing the importance of getting organ meats into people's diets for optimal health.

chunks.title: Concluding Thoughts on Ancestral Living
chunks.summary: The final segment summarizes the core principles of ancestral living as discussed throughout the podcast. Emphasis is placed on the power of liver as a key nutritional component and how to incorporate various ancestral tenants into modern life.
